case_title: NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC. VS. LEROY JACKSON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION SERVED SEP-20-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, LEROY
